title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: python-blivet bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for python-blivet is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [RHEL9] blivet.errors.LVMError: The object with LVM ID 'data/thinp' doesn't exist
[RHEL9] LVM VG size blivet doesn't use the real size of the PV format
[RHEL9] No details displayed when more than 3 partitions are created on a DASD disk
[RHEL9] Unable to reinstall system with corrupted LVM thin pool: device path does not exist or is not writable
[RHEL9] Reinstalling a system with software raid fails when creating the /boot/efi raid: "Device or resource busy"
[RHEL9] gi.overrides.BlockDev.LVMError: Process reported exit code 5: Device not found for /dev/vdb1.

full_text:
An update for python-blivet is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 9 Release Notes linked from the References section.
